flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Central Connecticut State University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.5k → $13.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Central Connecticut State University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (54.7% → 48.4%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Central Connecticut State University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (28.5% → 25.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Central Connecticut State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.1% → 0.0%).
